+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "open-webui-3527-feat-knowledge-projects-revamped-documents-section",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "open-webui: feat: knowledge/projects (revamped documents section)",
+    "description": "feat: knowledge/projects (revamped documents section). Requested by 26+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current open-webui deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your open-webui version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nhelm list -n open-webui 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working open-webui installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review open-webui configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant open-webui configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nkubectl get configmap -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-webui\n```\n#3521 #3231 #2044 #3110 #3464 #1096\r\r\r\r\r\r\n - Upload file via Files API\n - Process and link file to project(s) using file id\n - Chat with Files using project id(s) in chat completion payload"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for feat: knowledge/projects (revamped documents section)",
+        "description": "This pull request implements bulk tagging and untagging functionality for selected documents, addressing the feature request in issue #3110. This enhancement improves workflow efficiency by allowing users to manage tags for multiple documents simultaneously.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui\nkubectl get events -n open-webui --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"feat: knowledge/projects (revamped documents section)\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This pull request implements bulk tagging and untagging functionality for selected documents, addressing the feature request in issue #3110. This enhancement improves workflow efficiency by allowing users to manage tags for multiple documents simultaneously.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
